text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Inari One at a tatami mat shop in the
shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't get enough of the rush grass smell from new tatami mats. It's just so relaxin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Mind if I pop in for a sec? Don't worry, I won't
mess with your work.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Female Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's quite rare for someone so young to enjoy
the smell of tatami. Fancy lying down on a freshly
made mat?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You sure? 'Cause I'll take you up on that.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is great! I can feel all my cares melt away...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna move... I think I'll crash here for the
night...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that all the races have been taking a toll
on Inari One. Maybe I need to revise her race
schedule.
